description.value: Aura faint illusion; CL 1st; Slot wrists; Price 200 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION These translucent cloth tubes easily fit over their wearerâs arms. The wearer of these sleeves can, when she slips them on, choose to transform the appearance of her current garments into any other non-magical set of clothing. These new clothes fit her perfectly and are always clean and mended unless she specifically designates otherwise. When she removes the sleeves, her clothes revert to their original form. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, disguise self; Cost 100 gp.
